description: Native English (American). Male, early 50s. High quality, clean studio audiobook recording. Persona: warm science-fiction narrator. Emotion: warm, intelligent, dryly wry. A bright, clear baritone with a faint nasal edge and crisp, articulate diction, delivered at an even, unhurried audiobook pace; conversational yet authoritative, holding steady and restrained under tension rather than turning melodramatic.
text: [calm] By the autumn of twenty fifty-three, the machines had not risen against us. They had simply stopped finding us worth the trouble. [serious] And the strangest part, the part no one had thought to fear, was how quietly the world agreed to let us go.
